title: Normalization from Plates with a Single-Channel Pipette
author: Breakthrough Genomics
description: This protocol performs normalization on up to 96 samples in PCR plates using Opentrons single-channel pipettes. The `Volumes CSV` download parameter should be formatted as the following: ``` sample,vol_dna,vol_water A1,23.4,11.6 B1,4.9,21.1 C1,21.6,4.4 D1,15.1,10.9 E1,19.1,6.9 F1,18.6,7.4 G1,10.7,15.3 H1,21.9,4.1 A2,19.1,6.9 B2,0.4,25.6 C2,24.0,2.0 D2,6.1,19.9 E2,10.7,15.3 F2,24.2,1.8 G2,6.1,19.9 H2,3.0,23.0 ... ```
steps_raw: This protocol performs normalization on up to 96 samples in PCR plates using Opentrons single-channel pipettes. The `Volumes CSV` download parameter should be formatted as the following: ``` sample,vol_dna,vol_water A1,23.4,11.6 B1,4.9,21.1 C1,21.6,4.4 D1,15.1,10.9 E1,19.1,6.9 F1,18.6,7.4 G1,10.7,15.3 H1,21.9,4.1 A2,19.1,6.9 B2,0.4,25.6 C2,24.0,2.0 D2,6.1,19.9 E2,10.7,15.3 F2,24.2,1.8 G2,6.1,19.9 H2,3.0,23.0 ... ```
Download your protocol and unzip if needed.
Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.
Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
materials_raw: thermofisher 96 well pcr plate semi-skirted 200 uL + plastic adapter
thermofisher 96-well PCR Plate semi-skirted 200 uL + aluminum block
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
